prompt: Create a vertical smartphone flash selfie at night titled Nighttime Doodle Flash Selfie: an adult East Asian woman with messy short black hair taking an exaggerated close-up selfie in a busy outdoor restaurant or rooftop patio at night, city skyline lights and warm string lights in the background. The camera is ultra wide and held low/forward so one blue sleeve fills the lower-left foreground, creating a dynamic distorted arm perspective. She wears a bright cobalt-blue windbreaker jacket with shiny crinkled fabric and a black zipper. Her face is intentionally anonymized by a centered soft rectangular blur/mosaic block, but her black hair remains visible. Pose her with one hand raised beside her cheek in a playful claw gesture. Use harsh direct phone-flash lighting on the jacket and hand, with darker ambient background, candid chaotic energy, high contrast, documentary selfie realism. Add bold hand-drawn doodles layered over the photo in rough chalk/paint-marker style, mostly white with electric blue, yellow, green, black, and orange accents. Include exactly 15 major doodle elements: 1 huge white word "RAWR!" at the top left with a sweeping underline, 2 a white star near the top center, 3 a cloud speech bubble at the top right saying "CURRENT" in white and "MOOD" in blue with a blue underline, 4 a thick white arrow pointing down from that bubble toward the subject, 5 simple white cat ears drawn on top of her hair, 6 a small white crown above her head, 7 three white whisker lines on the right side of her face area, 8 a blue scribbled heart on the left with white radiating lines, 9 a large poster-like label on the lower-left sleeve saying "NOT" in black on an off-white paint patch and "NORMAL" in black over a neon-green brushstroke, 10 a blue lightning squiggle near the left lower background, 11 a white arrow rising from the bottom center toward the sleeve text, 12 a curved white arrow near the lower middle pointing toward the cartoon creature, 13 a green cartoon dinosaur/kaiju at the lower right with white dorsal spikes, angry eyes, open mouth, sharp teeth, and orange-red fire breath, 14 a white comic burst/hash mark beside the creature, 15 scattered hand-drawn stars: exactly 9 total around the frame, mixing white and yellow, including two large yellow stars on the left and right edges. Keep the doodles energetic and imperfect with visible brush texture, overlapping the photograph naturally. Use bright cobalt blue as the dominant color, with the blue doodle accents matching it. Composition should feel chaotic, rebellious, cute-monster themed, and social-media-ready, 9:16 vertical crop, no watermark, no extra readable text beyond "RAWR!", "CURRENT MOOD", and "NOT NORMAL".
